leaderboard_replay_drift.note: A mismatch is not automatically a bad local replay. Public PR comments show some PR100+ rows were evaluated once on CUDA and again on CPU; the leaderboard may follow the CPU result while this repo's score claims still require CUDA for promoted internal lanes.
